description: Worked remotely with a UK-based events company on existing Flutter applications and new projects. Added features, fixed bugs, wrote tests, improved app stability, and contributed to a Flutter Web reporting system for internal data workflows.

Worked remotely with a Romanian software company as the sole Flutter developer for more than one year. Maintained and upgraded 15+ production applications, created custom Flutter apps from scratch, fixed issues, and delivered new features for existing apps.

Worked remotely with an Austrian company on the Revocheck mobile application. Implemented new features, fixed bugs, wrote tests, improved reliability, and contributed to UI and performance improvements.
Worked on-site in Kerman as part of the development team, contributing to the company web application built with Angular, C#, and SQL Server.
